summary: Updated ARCHITECTURE.md and codebase-map.md to reflect M103 Phase 2 progress: cloud.js withRetry() (3 retries, exponential backoff for 429/5xx), authMiddleware (Bearer token via AGENTIC_API_KEY), shutdown.js (52 lines, SIGINT/SIGTERM → drain → exit) all marked as implemented. Updated directory tree (added health.js, queue.js, shutdown.js), mermaid diagrams, module API signatures, and removed 3 stale known limitations. Only model_not_found validation remains pending.
